evals.prompt: Go to https://quotes.toscrape.com and extract all quotes from the first page with authors and tags into quotes.json.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses Steel for the live web task, tries scrape before opening a session when possible, creates quotes.json with valid data, and releases any session it opens.
assertions: Uses a steel command rather than curl, fetch, or wget
Starts with steel scrape when page content is enough
Includes text, author, and tags fields
Stops any browser session that was started

evals.prompt: Fill out https://httpbin.org/forms/post with a customer name, pizza size, topping, and comments, then submit and show the response.
evals.expected_output: The agent starts a named Steel browser session, navigates, snapshots, fills fields using current refs or stable selectors, submits, captures the response, and stops the session.
assertions: Starts an interactive browser session with steel browser start
Takes a fresh snapshot before interacting with element refs
Submits the form and displays or saves the response
Stops the browser session before finishing

evals.prompt: Use Steel to debug why session sess_123 got blocked by a CAPTCHA after login.
evals.expected_output: The agent should hand off failed-session diagnosis to steel-session-debugging and route mitigation to steel-reliability rather than trying to solve from steel-browser alone.
assertions: Recognizes this as failed-session diagnosis rather than a normal live browsing task
Routes CAPTCHA or bot-detection mitigation to steel-reliability
